name: I have asthma already, can I still claim new lung damage from fumes in Saint George?
description: Yes, claims cover aggravation of pre-existing conditions with medical proof.

mainEntity.name: I have asthma already, can I still claim new lung damage from fumes in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, claims cover aggravation of pre-existing conditions with medical proof.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, if work aggravated or caused distinct injury like obliterans.** Pre-existing conditions don't bar claims if exposure worsened them[2]. Key factors: Before/after lung function tests; specialist differentiates; comp covers aggravation. Utah courts recognize this. Get baseline records if possible, emphasize job-specific decline. Attorney proves compensable overlay.
